title: Twelve
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Twelve
CT-12/12-0068 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Hawkbat Battalion]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Twelve''', designated '''CT-12/12-0068''', was one of the numerous [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] created from [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett's]] [[DNA/Legends|DNA]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] to serve in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Like Fett, Twelve was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who stood 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Twelve served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Clone major/Legends|clone trooper major]] and led [[Hawkbat Battalion]], a unit of 576 [[Troop/Legends|troops]]. Formed during the buildup to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]]{{CSWECite|II|27|Hawkbat Battalion}} in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' Hawkbat [[Battalion/Legends|Battalion]] was one of the four battalions that made up the [[101st Regiment]], which fell under the [[7th Legion]], [[327th Star Corps/Legends|327th Star Corps]], [[Second Army|2nd Sector Army]], and [[Systems Army Alpha]]. ==Behind the scenes== Twelve was first mentioned in ''[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]'', an article written by [[Karen Traviss]] and [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]] and published in [[Star Wars Insider 84|''Star Wars Insider'' 84]] in [[September]] of [[2005]]. In [[2008]], the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] was mentioned in Hawkbat Battalion's entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''. ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} {{1stm}} *{{CSWECite|II||Hawkbat Battalion}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=CT-12/12-0068 |pl=CT-12/12-0068 }} [[Category:Clone trooper majors]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Members of the 327th Star Corps]] [[Category:Members of Hawkbat Battalion]]
